name: one-blade-of-grass
description: Henry Shukman's 'One Blade of Grass: Finding the Old Road of the Heart, a Zen Memoir' — a beautifully written account of a lifetime Zen journey. From childhood trauma and chronic eczema through a profound awakening in a New Mexico meditation hall, to becoming a Zen teacher and founding Mountain Cloud Zen Center. Demystifies the 'cooking process' of Zen practice.
useCase: Understanding Zen awakening through a personal story, the koan path of Sanbo Zen, working through trauma with meditation, the teacher-student relationship, and what it means to be 'cooked' by practice.
knownRisks: Describes a specific awakening experience — not universal
Some Zen concepts may be unfamiliar to new readers
Childhood trauma scenes may be triggering
The path described is intensive — years of practice required
